Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Reroute at Damen/Webster
ShortDescription: #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Damen, Armitage, Hoyne, Webster and Damen due to street blockage near Damen/Webster.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Damen, Armitage, Hoyne, Webster, then resume their normal route on Damen.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Damen/Webster.

Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Reroute at Halsted/Archer
ShortDescription: #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, Archer, Canal, Cermak and Halsted due to a bridge lift near Halsted/Archer.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, Archer, Canal, Cermak, then resume their normal route on Halsted.
